__inputs.name: DS_INFLUXDB
__inputs.label: InfluxDB
__inputs.description: InfluxDB Cloud datasource — must use Flux query language

description: MAC Formula Electric — Real-time racecar telemetry

targets.query:
from(bucket: "macfe")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "car_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.signal == "Pack_Inst_Voltage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "macfe")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "car_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.signal == "Pack_Current")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "macfe")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "car_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.signal == "Pack_SOC")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "macfe")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "car_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.signal == "TempMotor")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "macfe")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "car_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.signal == "TempInverter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "macfe")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "car_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.signal == "lv_battery_voltage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "macfe")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "faults")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "active")
  |> group()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "system", "fault", "severity"])
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 100)

from(bucket: "macfe")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "car_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.signal == "Pack_Inst_Voltage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "battery_voltage")

from(bucket: "macfe")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "car_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.signal == "Pack_Current")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "pack_current")

from(bucket: "macfe")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "car_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.signal == "Speed")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "macfe")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "car_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.signal == "Pack_Current")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "macfe")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "car_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.signal == "ActualVelocity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.inverter == "inv1")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Left Motor")

from(bucket: "macfe")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "car_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.signal == "ActualVelocity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.inverter == "inv2")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Right Motor")

from(bucket: "macfe")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "car_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.signal == "HighThermValue")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.module == "0")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Max")

from(bucket: "macfe")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "car_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.signal == "LowThermValue")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.module == "0")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Min")

from(bucket: "macfe")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "car_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.signal == "AvgThermValue")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.module == "0")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Avg")

from(bucket: "macfe")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.signal == "HighThermValue")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.module == "1")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Max")

from(bucket: "macfe")

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "car_data")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.signal == "LowThermValue")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.module == "1")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Min")

from(bucket: "macfe")

title: Racecar DAQ
